mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
